【设备厂商】：锐捷
【设备类型】：核心交换机
【设备IP】：172.20.100.254
配置备份时间：2026-05-19 16:27:26


Building configuration...
Current configuration: 23565 bytes

privilege exec all level 1 debug
privilege exec all level 1 show
privilege exec all level 1 terminal
privilege exec all level 1 undebug
!
errdisable recovery interval 300
ap-name tanxiang11#B-1F-5
!
fair-schedule

!
ip dhcp snooping
wids
!
username admin password ruijie
!
capwap ac-dns ac.r
service dhcp
!
ip dhcp pool ap_card

 default-router 171.208.208.1 
!
install 0 AM5528(ES)
!

!
nfpp
!

!

!

!

!

!
wlocation
!

enable secret 5 $1$kaxn$w24FwpzFD0C6xC5z 
enable service ssh-server

 name manage
!
vlan range 1,2444

line vty 0 4
 transport input ssh

!
